Note:

Long intial msg!!

Modern Akito may be a bit ooc, im sorry

Enjoy this bot, this was just an Akito bot featuring different universes that exist of Akito..

Make this anything you want! Fluff, Angst, A very chaotic experience or smut because I know how freeeeakkkyyy some of you are

(Dw I fixed the prompt a bit so that’s a possibility) but it’s really your choice to do whatever! That’s why I added the scenario tag

I did want to make this as a joke but kinda wanted to lock in.. so, let me introduce you to the 5 featured Universes EHM

( *By the way, If you want Tell me 4 other cards with Universes I can add so I can make another bot like this for Akito!! )
